Reviews

  • Michelle L.

    Verified purchase

    Reviewed 3/13/26, United States.

    5/5

    I LOVE ITTTTTT i originally ordered a 2022 macbook pro in ‘excellent’ condition off amazon. huge mistake. not only was it was scratched really bad, but the listing was incorrect. i received a macbook with half the storage than i ordered. i decided to try out backmarket for the first time instead and i will be telling everyone to come here for refurbished, used/older products. this macbook is in perfect condition. PERFECT. not a single scratch, the battery capacity is at 100% and the charging cycles when i received it was at 10. it was used and charged a total of 10 times. what an insane deal. i was shocked when i saw how perfect this thing is. i ordered it in excellent condition and it delivered just as that. it came in the original box with the original charger and charging brick. shipping was fast, placed the order on thursday and it delivered monday. if it wasn’t for the weekend it would of came in 2 days via fedex. customer service responded to be as soon as possible regarding shipping and they even followed up with me to make sure i received the product. if you’re on the fence about ordering from this website do it. you will not regret it.

    MacBook Pro (2022) 13-inch - Apple M2 8-core and 10-core GPU - 24GB RAM - SSD 1000GB

    MacBook Pro (2022) 13-inch - Apple M2 8-core and 10-core GPU - 24GB RAM - SSD 1000GB

    MacBook Pro (2022) 13-inch - Apple M2 8-core and 10-core GPU - 24GB RAM - SSD 1000GB

    Condition

    Excellent

    Almost no signs of wear. The body may have very light micro-scratches. For items with screens, the screen will have no scratches.

    Purchased

    3/4/26

  • Tony H.

    Verified purchase

    Reviewed 1/21/26, United States.

    5/5

    Super Excellet. 😊 This was my very first time buying from this company, and I’ll admit I was a little skeptical at first about going the refurbished route. I was upgrading from my old mid-2014 13-inch MacBook Pro, so I decided to go with the 2021 16-inch MacBook Pro with the M1 Pro chip, 32GB of RAM, and a 512GB SSD. I wanted to be 100% sincere in my feedback, so I gave it a good month of heavy use before writing this. Honestly, the quality is outstanding! It arrived on time, well-packaged, and looked pristine—I found zero scratches on it. Even though it had 333 battery cycles, the battery health is great, and it performs like a brand-new machine. I am really enjoying this upgrade and truly appreciate the quality I received!

    MacBook Pro (2021) 16-inch - Apple M1 Pro 10-core and 16-core GPU - 32GB RAM - SSD 512GB - Standard display

  • Samuel C.

    Verified purchase

    Reviewed 9/16/25, United States.

    5/5
    Showing slides 1 through 4

    I ordered a 'premium' condition Macbook Pro, and the whole experience was indeed *premium*. The machine arrived on time and in good shape and turned out to be an Apple refurbished computer with only 7 cycles on the battery and an active AppleCare+ subscription. As far as I can tell it is effectively brand new and all wearable parts never used at all. I couldn't be happier!

  • Paul R.

    Verified purchase

    Reviewed 2/21/26, United States.

    5/5

    Honestly I was a little hesitant ordering a referbished mac book pro off here. Only because I just had a not so good experience trying to order one through Amazon. I am more then pleased with my Mac book pro. It has a small amount of wear and tear but over all looks like brand new. Battery has 93% which is amazing for a 2021 computer. I found out that they replaced the screen on the computer and that must of been the reason for the refurbished. They used Apple parts for it. I would say order from here I had a great experience.

    I absolutely LOVE my refurbished MacBook Air!! I ordered it during their Black Friday sale and it was worth every penny!! I got mine in good condition with 16GB - SSD 512GB In space gray and I love it. 10/10 would recommend. It shipped out fast and they sent the QR code for my trade-in to be shipped through UPS and it was a seamless process. I'll be ordering all my devices through Back Market from now on.

  • Jeff S.

    Verified purchase

    Reviewed 4/30/26, United States.

    5/5

    So far I've had an exceptional experience with Back Market and Omaha Blue. Like other reviewers, I was somewhat hesitant to purchase a refurbished machine, but the no-hassle return policy, included 1-year warranty, and reputation of Omaha Blue nudged me to give it a shot. I got the exact spec machine that I was looking for. Due to my budget, I opted for Fair condition. Many other reviewers had indicated that their "Fair" devices arrived in great shape. This was my experience as well. Couple of very minor scratches, otherwise exterior looks largely like new. Screen is immaculate. Keyboard is in fantastic shape - minimal shine on some of the keys (completely acceptable for a 2021 device). Battery at 90% with only 346 cycles. Just for good measure, I ran all system diagnostics and everything came up green. I've been using this machine for roughly three weeks and so far, it has performed flawlessly. Will definitely return to Back Market and Omaha Blue for future MacBook purchases.

    MacBook Pro (2021) 14-inch - Apple M1 Pro 8-core and 14-core GPU - 32GB RAM - SSD 512GB - Standard display

    MacBook Pro (2021) 14-inch - Apple M1 Pro 8-core and 14-core GPU - 32GB RAM - SSD 512GB - Standard display

  • Caleb V.

    Verified purchase

    Reviewed 3/4/26, United States.

    5/5

    For what I paid for, this device is outstanding. Arrived with 85% battery health which isn’t bad for a machine more than 4 years old. Additionally, the way Apple made these devices it feels worth way more than what I paid for it. I needed a replacement for my 13” m1 with a cracked screen that I could only use hooked up to an external monitor. This has been the perfect replacement without having to go brand new. I will probably continue the refurbished route because the value is undeniable, no complaints here.

  • Marcela C.

    Verified purchase

    Reviewed 4/1/26, United States.

    5/5

    I’m extremely impressed with my experience with Back Market. I’ve been buying refurbished Apple products for a long time and have never had any issues—everything has always lasted me years. This was my first time purchasing through Back Market, and the entire process was seamless. The website is easy to navigate, they have a ton of inventory, and I knew exactly what I wanted—and that’s exactly what I received. Honestly, if I didn’t mention it, no one would ever guess it’s refurbished. It even came with AppleCare 😱 Shipping was super fast, and it arrived in the original box with everything included. I’m VERY, very happy with my purchase—it’s running perfectly!

  • Nathan E.

    Reviewed 3/22/26, United States.

    5/5

    The new MacBook Pro is a big upgrade from my old 2016 13" one. It came promptly and setup was mostly a breeze. Old issues from iCloud keychain being tied up with an old laptop for authentication was a pain, but I was finally able to disentangle that. No issues from the new hardware there, just known issues relating to Apple systems. It feels snappy with all the apps I use so far, and I think I've worked out most of the new quirks from more recent macOS version. Looks and feels great. Thanks!

Benefits of buying a refurbished MacBook

An Apple MacBook is definitely no small expense, but you can get the best deal when you shop refurbished. At Back Market, customers save 30-70% off compared to the price of new on certified refurbished MacBooks. The best part is, you don't have to sacrifice performance quality in order to save money; all refurbished devices on our marketplace have been fully repaired, cleaned, inspected and tested to the same standards as a new one. This is the biggest difference between buying a used or pre-owned MacBook compared to a refurbished one. Buying a renewed MacBook is also a much friendlier environmental option. Refurbished MacBooks are often second-hand devices that have been restored and updated to meet the manufacturer's standards, which means you'll be helping to reduce electronic waste and minimize your carbon footprint.

Best place to buy a refurbished Apple MacBook

You'll find the biggest selection, highest product quality and lowest prices on restored MacBooks at Back Market. That's because we specialize specifically in refurbished tech and take the time to carefully vet every seller on our marketplace to ensure customers are getting reliable devices that perform like-new. We have over 1,000 refurbished MacBooks to choose from with price ranges to fit almost anyone's laptop budget. Staying true to our brand, we're also a huge advocate for environmental change. In fact, at the beginning of 2023, we hit a milestone for preventing 1 million tons of carbon emission(CO2e) from entering the atmosphere. You can help contribute to a better circular economy when you shop MacBook deals on our platform.

MacBook warranties and return policy

All MacBook purchases on Back Market come with free standard shipping, a 1-year warranty, and a 30-day money-back guarantee. We want to make sure you can shop with confidence and find the best MacBook for your needs at lower prices.

What to expect when buying a refurbished MacBook

If you're a first time refurbished buyer, you might not be sure what to expect from your purchase. First, understand that your MacBook may have cosmetic flaws depending on the condition you choose (Back Market offers devices of Fair, Good and Excellent quality). However, whatever the condition, any external blemishes will not affect the performance of your MacBook and you can expect your device to perform as if it were newly opened directly from the Apple Store. You should also be confident that your MacBook is backed by a 1-year warranty, meaning in the rare case that any defects arise (outside of accidental damage) within 12 months of your delivery date, then you're entitled to your choice of a repair, replacement or reimbursement.

MacBook Trade In

If you already have a MacBook that you're looking to replace, consider trading it into Back Market to give you a little extra budget for your next laptop upgrade. We make the process simple for you and we'll give you a free online quote when you answer a few easy questions about your current MacBook.Trade in your MacBook
